getStartedHint: Complete these steps to get the most out of Edmission.
stepMinimalProfile: Complete minimal profile (name, where born, where studied)
completeProfileForRecs: Complete your profile to get recommendations.
portfolioIntro: Fill in your details step by step — this helps universities and the matching system recommend suitable programs and scholarships.
profileVisibilityHint: Default is private: universities see education, skills, interests and goals — not your name, photo, email or contacts. Other students always see your full profile.
profileVisibilityPrivateLong: Universities only see education-related information. Your name, photo and contact details stay hidden from them.
profileVisibilityPublicLong: Universities can see your full profile, including name, photo and contact information.
title: Title / role
noOffersDesc: Show interest to universities and wait for offers.
noApplicationsDesc: Explore universities and show interest to start applying.
tryChangingFiltersOrSearch: Try changing filters or search to see more results.
profileFilterNoMatches: No universities match your profile preferences. Showing the full catalog — you can turn profile matching back on in filters.
noUniversitiesInList: No universities in your list yet. Show interest on Explore page.
schoolInvitationsHint: A school invited you to join. Accept to connect or decline.

tutorial.slide1Body: Complete your profile with personal details, education, and documents. The more complete your profile, the better university recommendations you'll receive. Go to Profile in the sidebar to get started.
tutorial.slide2Body:
Dashboard — overview of your progress and recommendations.
Universities — explore and show interest.
Applications — track your applications.
Offers — see offers from universities.
Documents — upload required documents.
Compare — compare universities side by side.
tutorial.slide3Body: Browse universities, click Show interest to start an application. Universities can send you offers. Accept or decline from the Offers page. Use Chat to communicate with universities.
tutorial.slide4Body: Use the search bar in the header to quickly find universities by name. If nothing is found, you can Search with AI to ask natural questions.
tutorial.slide5Body: The AI assistant helps you find universities, understand requirements, and get answers. Use the floating button or open it from the sidebar. Ask anything about studies, scholarships, or the platform.
